hero.title: Your identity as one portable file
hero.subtitle: A file any AI reads, and a one-page profile you read
hero.speech: This is the you that any assistant can pick up and understand.

intro.body: IDEN gathers what you've learned about yourself into a single portable file. Copy it into any AI to give it your context, or open the one-page sheet.

generate.accessibilityHint: Generates your identity file from your saved data.

result.title: Your IDEN is ready
result.hint: Copy this into ChatGPT, Gemini, or Claude to give it your context. Your request goes at the very bottom.

error: Couldn't build your IDEN. Refresh and try again.

entry.body: Turn what you've learned about yourself into one portable file any AI can read, plus a one-page profile.
entry.accessibilityHint: Opens the IDEN identity export screen.
